summary: Iter 33 — WXM theme presets + one-click 'Apply to site'. Backend 13/13 pytest pass; Frontend Themes tab UI + click-to-apply flow + public-site CSS variable injection all verified end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: wxm.py register_wxm() uses asyncio.create_task(_ensure_preset_themes(db)) at import-time inside register; works but if event loop is replaced at startup this could miss. Consider wiring via FastAPI startup event for determinism.

useActiveTheme.js caches the active theme in a module-level _cache; admins switching themes won't see the new colour on already-open public tabs unless invalidateActiveTheme() is broadcast (e.g. via storage or websocket). Acceptable for current marketing-site use; flag for future.
test_credentials: admin@projexino.com / Projexino@2026; intern@projexino.com / Intern@2026 — both verified working
seed_data_creation: None added; relied on auto-seeded PRESET_THEMES (6) which are idempotent. State at end: 'Crimson Pulse' is the currently-active site theme.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 33 ships a Themes 'Apply to site' flow. 6 presets self-seed on startup. POST /api/wxm/themes/{id}/activate enforces single-active invariant. GET /api/public/wxm/active-theme is no-auth. Frontend Navbar mounts useActiveTheme() which injects <style id='wxm-theme-override'> and sets --brand-primary. Note: there exists a non-preset 'Sunset' theme that pre-dates this iteration — not a bug, just extra. Total themes returned = 7.

backend_tests_summary.preset_seeding: 5/5 pass — all 6 presets present, _preset=true, no duplicates
backend_tests_summary.activate_endpoint: 4/4 pass — 200 + is_site_active=true, single-active invariant on switch, 404 on missing id
backend_tests_summary.public_active_theme: 2/2 pass — no-auth returns current theme with correct primary_color, no _id leak

frontend_tests_summary.themes_tab: 7 cards, 7 apply buttons rendered; 6 'Preset' badges; all 6 preset names visible
frontend_tests_summary.apply_flow: Click Apply on Crimson Pulse → toast 'Crimson Pulse is now live on the public site.' → exactly 1 active badge on page, on Crimson Pulse card, header chip updated to 'Live: Crimson Pulse'
frontend_tests_summary.public_site_application: Opened / in new tab → <style id='wxm-theme-override'> present (2513 chars); document.documentElement --brand-primary = #EF4444 (matches Crimson Pulse exactly)
